targets.query:
FinalizedMessageSnapshot
| summarize ["Dati aggiornati dal:"] = format_datetime(max(window_start), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')

options.content:
KPI North Star: Indice di Conversione e Copertura Ecosistema
[1. SEND]
(Invia MDC)
[2. EMD]
(Accetta/Scarta)
[3. PSP]
(Smistamento)
[4. PORTALE SEND]
(Perfezionamento)
[5. APP BANCARIA]
(Pagamento)

targets.query:
MessageVolumeSnapshot
| where window_start >= startofday(ago(1d)) and window_start < startofday(now())
| summarize TotaleEventi = coalesce(sum(message_sent_count), 0) + coalesce(sum(message_discarded_count), 0)
| extend ['Stato Servizio'] = iff(TotaleEventi > 0, "OPERATIVO", "NON OPERATIVO")
| project ['Stato Servizio']

options.content:
(Pagamenti Completati / Messaggi Accettati) / PSP Attivi
Misura l'efficacia della transazione finale pesata sulla capillarità e l'attivazione dei Prestatori di Servizi di Pagamento (PSP).

targets.query:
MessageVolumeSnapshot
| where $__timeFilter(window_start)
| summarize ['Messaggi Ricevuti'] = coalesce(sum(message_discarded_count), 0)

MessageVolumeSnapshot
| where $__timeFilter(window_start)
| summarize  Discarded = coalesce(sum(message_discarded_count), 0), Total = coalesce(sum(message_total_count), 0)
| extend ['Tasso di Scarto'] = round(100.0 * Discarded / Total, 2)
| project ['Tasso di Scarto']

MessageVolumeSnapshot
| where $__timeFilter(window_start)
| summarize 
    ['Accettati con pagamento']   = coalesce(sum(sent_with_payment), 0),
    ['Accettati senza pagamento'] = coalesce(sum(sent_without_payment), 0),
    ['Scartati con pagamento']    = coalesce(sum(discarded_with_payment), 0),
    ['Scartati senza pagamento']  = coalesce(sum(discarded_without_payment), 0)

MessageVolumeSnapshot
| where $__timeFilter(window_start)
| summarize ['Messaggi accettati'] = sum(message_sent_count), 
            ['Messaggi scartati']  = sum(message_discarded_count) 
  by bin(window_start, 1d)
| order by window_start asc

MessageVolumeSnapshot
| where $__timeFilter(window_start)
| summarize ['Messaggi accettati'] = coalesce(sum(message_sent_count), 0)

MessageVolumeSnapshot
| where $__timeFilter(window_start)
| summarize Sent = coalesce(sum(message_sent_count), 0), Total = coalesce(sum(message_total_count), 0)
| extend ['Tasso di Accettazione'] = round(100.0 * Sent / Total, 2)
| project ['Tasso di Accettazione']

let excludedPsp = dynamic(["TestEmdTpp", "MDC Test"]);
let payment_map =
    MessageSnapshot
    | summarize arg_max(window_start, associated_payment) by origin_id;
let known_origins =
    MessageSnapshot
    | where message_state == "SENT"
    | summarize by origin_id;
let inviate =
    MessageSnapshot
    | where message_state == "SENT"
    | where $__timeFilter(window_start)
    | summarize arg_max(window_start, entity_id) by origin_id, entity_id
    | project origin_id, entity_id, is_inviata = true;
let lette =
    RetrievalIdVolumeSnapshot
    | where $__timeFilter(window_start)
    | where origin_id in (known_origins)
    | summarize arg_max(window_start, entity_id) by origin_id, entity_id
    | project origin_id, entity_id, is_letta = true;
let perfezionate =
    FinalizedMessageSnapshot
    | where $__timeFilter(window_start)
    | where origin_id in (known_origins)
    | summarize arg_max(window_start, tpp_id) by origin_id
    | project origin_id, is_perfezionata = true;
let tutti =
    inviate
    | project origin_id, entity_id
    | union (lette | project origin_id, entity_id)
    | summarize arg_max(origin_id, entity_id) by origin_id;
let tutte_le_tpp =
    TppDataSnapshot
    | where business_name !in~ (excludedPsp)
    | summarize by entity_id, PSP = business_name;
tutte_le_tpp
| join kind=leftouter (
    tutti
    | join kind=leftouter payment_map on origin_id
    | join kind=inner TppDataSnapshot on entity_id
    | join kind=leftouter (inviate | project origin_id, is_inviata)      on origin_id
    | join kind=leftouter (lette | project origin_id, is_letta)        on origin_id
    | join kind=leftouter (perfezionate | project origin_id, is_perfezionata) on origin_id
    )
    on entity_id
| summarize
    ['Inv. Con Pagamento']    = dcountif(origin_id, associated_payment == true and is_inviata == true),
    ['Inv. Senza Pagamento']  = dcountif(origin_id, associated_payment == false and is_inviata == true),
    ['Inviate Totale']        = dcountif(origin_id, is_inviata == true),
    ['Lette Con Pagamento']   = dcountif(origin_id, associated_payment == true and is_letta == true),
    ['Lette Senza Pagamento'] = dcountif(origin_id, associated_payment == false and is_letta == true),
    ['Lette Totale']          = dcountif(origin_id, is_letta == true),
    ['Perf. Con Pagamento']   = dcountif(origin_id, associated_payment == true and is_perfezionata == true),
    ['Perf. Senza Pagamento'] = dcountif(origin_id, associated_payment == false and is_perfezionata == true),
    ['Perfezionate Totale']   = dcountif(origin_id, is_perfezionata == true)
    by PSP
| extend ['Tasso di Lettura']     = round(100.0 * ['Lette Totale'] / iff(['Inviate Totale'] == 0, 1, ['Inviate Totale']), 2)
| extend ['Tasso di Pagamento'] = round(100.0 * ['Perfezionate Totale'] / iff(['Lette Totale'] == 0, 1, ['Lette Totale']), 2)
| project 
    PSP,
    ['Inv. Con Pagamento'],
    ['Inv. Senza Pagamento'],
    ['Inviate Totale'],
    ['Lette Con Pagamento'],
    ['Lette Senza Pagamento'],
    ['Lette Totale'],
    ['Perf. Con Pagamento'],
    ['Perf. Senza Pagamento'],
    ['Tasso di Lettura'],
    ['Tasso di Pagamento']
| order by ['Tasso di Lettura'] desc

panels.title: Notifiche con tentato pagamento per PSP

targets.query:
let tutte_le_tpp =
    TppDataSnapshot
    | summarize by tpp_id, PSP = business_name;

PaymentAttemptSnapshot
| where $__timeFilter(window_start)
| summarize ['Tentativi di Pagamento'] = sum(attempt_count)
    by ['Origin Id'] = origin_id, ['Notice Number'] = notice_number, tpp_id
| join kind=leftouter tutte_le_tpp on tpp_id
| project PSP, ['Origin Id'], ['Notice Number'], ['Tentativi di Pagamento']
| order by ['Tentativi di Pagamento'] desc

panels.title: Numero tentativi di pagamento per notifica

targets.query:
CitizenMetricsSnapshot
| extend consents_dynamic = todynamic(consents)
| extend consent_keys = bag_keys(consents_dynamic)
| mv-expand key = consent_keys to typeof(string)
| extend consent_obj  = consents_dynamic[key]
| extend tppState     = tobool(consent_obj["tppState"])
| extend tcDate_ms    = tolong(consent_obj["tcDate"]["$date"])
| extend tppDate      = datetime(1970-01-01) + totimespan(tcDate_ms * 1ms)
| where $__timeFilter(tppDate)
| summarize has_any_true = countif(tppState == true) by fiscal_code
| summarize ['Cittadini con consenso'] = countif(has_any_true >= 1)

CitizenMetricsSnapshot
| extend consents_dynamic = todynamic(consents)
| extend consent_keys = bag_keys(consents_dynamic)
| mv-expand key = consent_keys to typeof(string)
| extend consent_obj  = consents_dynamic[key]
| extend tppState     = tobool(consent_obj["tppState"])
| extend tcDate_ms    = tolong(consent_obj["tcDate"]["$date"])
| extend tppDate      = datetime(1970-01-01) + totimespan(tcDate_ms * 1ms)
| where $__timeFilter(tppDate)
| summarize has_any_true = countif(tppState == true) by fiscal_code
| summarize ['Cittadini senza consenso'] = countif(has_any_true == 0)

CitizenMetricsSnapshot
| extend consents_dynamic = todynamic(consents)
| extend consent_keys = bag_keys(consents_dynamic)
| mv-expand key = consent_keys to typeof(string)
| extend consent_obj    = consents_dynamic[key]
| extend tppState       = tobool(consent_obj["tppState"])
| extend tcDate         = unixtime_milliseconds_todatetime(tolong(consent_obj["tcDate"]["$date"]))
| where tcDate >= $__timeFrom and tcDate <= $__timeTo
| summarize 
    has_any_true    = countif(tppState == true),
    last_true_date  = maxif(tcDate, tppState == true),
    last_false_date = maxif(tcDate, tppState == false)
  by fiscal_code
| extend stato         = iff(has_any_true > 0, "Attivi", "Inattivi")
| extend relevant_date = iff(stato == "Attivi", last_true_date, last_false_date)
| summarize 
    Attivi    = dcountif(fiscal_code, stato == "Attivi"),
    Disattivi = dcountif(fiscal_code, stato == "Disattivi")
  by bin(relevant_date, 1d)
| order by relevant_date asc

CitizenMetricsSnapshot
| extend consents_dynamic = todynamic(consents)
| extend consent_keys = bag_keys(consents_dynamic)
| mv-expand key = consent_keys to typeof(string)
| extend consent_obj = consents_dynamic[key]
| extend tppState    = tobool(consent_obj["tppState"])
| extend tcDate_ms   = tolong(consent_obj["tcDate"]["$date"])
| extend tppDate     = datetime(1970-01-01) + totimespan(tcDate_ms * 1ms)
| where $__timeFilter(tppDate)
| summarize has_any_true = countif(tppState == true) by fiscal_code
| summarize Attivi = countif(has_any_true >= 1), Inattivi = countif(has_any_true == 0)
| extend Totale = Attivi + Inattivi
| extend ['Tasso di Attivazione'] = iff(Totale == 0, 0.0, round(100.0 * Attivi / Totale, 2))
| project ['Tasso di Attivazione']

CitizenMetricsSnapshot
| extend consents_dynamic = todynamic(consents)
| extend consent_keys = bag_keys(consents_dynamic)
| mv-expand key = consent_keys to typeof(string)
| extend consent_obj = consents_dynamic[key]
| extend tppState    = tobool(consent_obj["tppState"])
| extend tcDate_ms   = tolong(consent_obj["tcDate"]["$date"])
| extend tppDate     = datetime(1970-01-01) + totimespan(tcDate_ms * 1ms)
| where $__timeFilter(tppDate)
| summarize has_any_true = countif(tppState == true) by fiscal_code
| summarize Attivi = countif(has_any_true >= 1), Inattivi = countif(has_any_true == 0)
| extend Totale = Attivi + Inattivi
| extend ['Tasso di Disattivazione'] = iff(Totale == 0, 0.0, round(100.0 * Inattivi / Totale, 2))
| project ['Tasso di Disattivazione']

let excludedPsp = dynamic(["TestEmdTpp", "MDC Test"]);
CitizenMetricsSnapshot
| extend consents_dynamic = todynamic(consents)
| mv-expand tpp_id = bag_keys(consents_dynamic)
| extend tpp_id    = tostring(tpp_id)
| extend tcDate_ms = tolong(consents_dynamic[tpp_id].tcDate["$date"])
| extend tppDate   = datetime(1970-01) + totimespan(tcDate_ms * 1ms)
| where $__timeFilter(tppDate)
| extend is_active = tobool(consents_dynamic[tpp_id].tppState)
| lookup kind=leftouter TppDataSnapshot on tpp_id
| where isempty(business_name) or business_name !in~ (excludedPsp)
| summarize 
    ['Utenti attivi']   = dcountif(fiscal_code, is_active == true),
    ['Utenti disattivi'] = dcountif(fiscal_code, is_active == false)
    by PSP = coalesce(business_name, tpp_id)
| extend ['Totale'] = ['Utenti attivi'] + ['Utenti disattivi']
| extend ['% Attivi']   = round(100.0 * ['Utenti attivi']   / ['Totale'], 1)
| extend ['% Disattivi'] = round(100.0 * ['Utenti disattivi'] / ['Totale'], 1)
| order by ['Utenti attivi'] desc
